device_name: X100/X100HT with Full Field Peripheral Blood Smear (PBS) Application
intended_use: The X100/X100HT with Full Field Peripheral Blood Smear Application is intended to locate and display images of white cells, red cells, and platelets acquired from fixed and stained peripheral blood sm
intended_use_full: The X100/X100HT with Full Field Peripheral Blood Smear Application is intended to locate and display images of white cells, red cells, and platelets acquired from fixed and stained peripheral blood smears and assists a qualified technologist in conducting a WBC differential, RBC morphology evaluation, and platelet estimate using those images. For in–vitro diagnostic use only. For professional use only.
target_condition: peripheral blood cell morphology abnormalities; platelet clumping
ground_truth: Not explicitly stated; inferred to be expert manual evaluation or standard reference methodology for peripheral blood smear analysis
other_metrics: Repeatability study (20x2x2 design, 27 test samples) and reproducibility study (3x5x5 design, 16 test samples) per CLSI EP05-A3 both met pre-defined acceptance criteria
